entry_a.title: Never commit to main
entry_a.content: Main is protected — direct commits and pushes fail at the pre-push hook. All changes go through a worktree branch and a pull request. Even one-line fixes.

entry_b.title: Branch protection rejects direct commits
entry_b.content: Any attempt to commit to main locally is caught by a pre-commit guard; direct pushes bounce server-side. Always branch + PR, even for trivial edits.

notes: Both advise the same branch-protection/PR-workflow rule.
